title: Makefile: don't hard-code the path for bash
body:
On FreeBSD, it usually lives in /usr/local/bin/bash. This uses the shell 'commmand' builtin to find the path which works in bash, dash and the FreeBSD /bin/sh.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
